column_metadata.comment:
-- description: Nested structure containing 5 fields
  -- displayName: Issue
  -- isStruct: True
  -- datatype: VARCHAR
column_metadata.name: v1.issue

properties.description: Nested structure containing 5 fields

column_metadata.comment:
-- description: The CVSS score associated with the issue, derived from the v1 Reporting API, indicating the severity of vulnerabilities based on the Common Vulnerability Scoring System.
  -- displayName: CVSS Score
  -- datatype: STRING
column_metadata.name: v1.issue.cvssScore

properties.description: The CVSS score associated with the issue, derived from the v1 Reporting API, indicating the severity of vulnerabilities based on the Common Vulnerability Scoring System.

column_metadata.comment:
-- description: The programming language or platform associated with the issue, as reported by the v1 API, providing context for the type of code being analyzed.
  -- displayName: Issue Programming Language
  -- datatype: STRING
column_metadata.name: v1.issue.language

properties.description: The programming language or platform associated with the issue, as reported by the v1 API, providing context for the type of code being analyzed.

column_metadata.comment:
-- description: The name of the package associated with the issue as reported by the v1 Reporting API, providing context for the vulnerability or compliance issue identified.
  -- displayName: V1 Issue Package Name
  -- datatype: STRING
column_metadata.name: v1.issue.package

properties.description: The name of the package associated with the issue as reported by the v1 Reporting API, providing context for the vulnerability or compliance issue identified.

column_metadata.comment:
-- description: Timestamp indicating when the vulnerability was first publicly disclosed, relevant for assessing the age and potential impact of the issue.
  -- displayName: Publication Time of Vulnerability
  -- datatype: STRING
column_metadata.name: v1.issue.publicationTime

properties.description: Timestamp indicating when the vulnerability was first publicly disclosed, relevant for assessing the age and potential impact of the issue.

column_metadata.comment:
-- description: An array of semantic versioning (semver) ranges that indicate the versions of the package that are vulnerable to the identified issue, providing context for potential upgrades or fixes.
  -- displayName: Vulnerable Semver Ranges
  -- datatype: ARRAYSTRING
column_metadata.name: v1.issue.semver.vulnerable

properties.description: An array of semantic versioning (semver) ranges that indicate the versions of the package that are vulnerable to the identified issue, providing context for potential upgrades or fixes.
